text:
There once was a cat named Whiskers. He lived indoors, but he loved spending time outside. His favourite thing to do was gaze at the stars.

One night, while peeking out of the window, he saw a ghostly ship sailing past. He hissed nervously at the thing, thinking it might be dangerous. But it glowed softly, just like the moon?

Whiskers didn't want to frighten it. In fact, he thought maybe it was just a lost soul. He crept up softly until he was close enough to say hello. The ghost just smiled gently, and Whiskers felt a chill.

Then something strange happened. It began to rain stars! Each star fell gently on him. Whiskers' fur bristled. This ghost wasn't scary; it was kind. He followed the raindrops, which led him into an enchanted forest.

There, under an ancient willow, sat a wise old owl. "You've seen many
